name: Seasonal Maintenance Chemical Inventory Configuration
description:
As an Environmental Engineer for a State DOT, you need to configure a seasonal winter chemical in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Start the application and create a new facility named 'MNDOT District 6 - Rochester Yard' (Address: 2900 48th St NW, Rochester, MN 55901). Navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add a new chemical with the following exact details: 

- Chemical Name: Calcium Chloride
- CAS Number: 10043-52-4
- Chemical Type: Pure
- Physical State: Liquid
- EHS / Trade Secret: No

Health Hazards (based on SDS):
- Acute toxicity (any route of exposure): Check
- Skin corrosion or irritation: Check
- Serious eye damage or eye irritation: Check
- Ensure all Physical Hazards are unchecked.

Seasonal Inventory Quantities:
- Maximum Daily Amount: 120000 (lbs)
- Average Daily Amount: 45000 (lbs)
- Number of Days On-Site: 150

Storage Location:
- Storage Type: Above ground tank
- Temperature: Ambient temperature
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Location Description: Winter Maintenance Shed - Brine Tank 1

Once complete, save and export the submission file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\mndot_district6_final.t2s'.
